decisions.question: Visual direction
decisions.rationale: Clean, data-dense, violet-accented. Familiar to analytics users.

decisions.question: Theme support
decisions.answer: Both light and dark mode with toggle, persisted to localStorage, defaulting to OS preference
decisions.rationale: Best UX. Ant Design supports theming natively via ConfigProvider.

decisions.question: Primary font
decisions.answer: Inter (400, 500, 600) via @fontsource/inter. Monospace: JetBrains Mono for code/IDs.
decisions.rationale: Inter is the standard for data-dense SaaS UIs. JetBrains Mono for technical content.

decisions.question: Color palette
decisions.answer: Violet accent (#7c3aed light, #a78bfa dark). 8-color chart series defined in BR-306. Semantic: green/red/amber for success/error/warning.
decisions.rationale: Exact hex values in spec. No ambiguity.

decisions.question: Spacing system
decisions.answer: 8px grid. Sidebar 240px fixed. Content 24px padding. Cards 16px padding, 8px radius.
decisions.rationale: Consistent spatial rhythm. All values defined in BR-305.

guardrails: No hex colors outside the palette defined in BR-306 — use CSS variables or Ant Design tokens
No font-family declarations outside Inter and JetBrains Mono
No font sizes outside the scale: 12, 13, 14, 16, 24px
All charts must use the 8-color series palette in order
All charts must have axis labels, tooltips, and empty states
Skeleton loaders for loading states — no spinners except in buttons
Empty states must have icon + text + suggested action
Error states must be red banner — no raw JSON or stack traces
Dark and light themes must both be tested — no broken contrast
